hero.title: Verifiable Policy. Uncompromised Access.
hero.subtitle: We eliminate policy bottlenecks by providing architectural oversight and deep programmatic Subject Matter Expertise (SME). We translate complex mandates into deterministic code upfront, keeping deployments moving, predicting downstream effects, and guaranteeing federal compliance.

challenge.label: The Translation Gap
challenge.title: Accelerating Technical Alignment.
challenge.text: State tech deployments often stall in the gap between complex federal rules and system architecture. We bridge this divide. Instead of IT waiting months for open-ended policy interpretations, we translate programmatic mandates into deterministic logic upfront. We arm your engineering teams with the exact parameters they need to force rapid, on-the-spot decisions from policy stakeholders—keeping deployments moving, predicting downstream effects, and securing federal compliance.
challenge.solution: We deploy clear policy engineering, rigid procurement rules, and frontline-first change management to force accountability—whether your system is built by a prime vendor or an in-house IT team—and legally secure your infrastructure.

infrastructure.label: Holistic Oversight
infrastructure.title: Architectural Acceleration & SME.
infrastructure.text: We deploy strict technical rules informed by cross-program expertise to bypass bureaucratic drag and ensure systemic changes do not trigger automated federal penalties.

sandbox.label: Simulator 01
sandbox.title: Automated Policy Testing
sandbox.text: See how we use mathematical logic to verify legislative changes upfront and predict downstream blast radiuses before they reach production code.

manual.label: Simulator 02
manual.title: The Time Tax Audit
manual.text: See how we measure the exact administrative burden placed on residents to legally defend your state's policy choices.

extraction.label: Simulator 03
extraction.title: Immutable Appeal Records
extraction.text: See how we freeze system data to create an unquestionable, secure record for legal appeals and fair hearings.

hero.label: Capabilities
hero.title: Architectural Oversight & Policy Engineering
hero.subtitle: We provide targeted engineering oversight and wide-lens SME capabilities to eliminate policy lag. We ensure programmatic changes are translated flawlessly into code without stalling IT or triggering catastrophic cross-program errors.

statutory.title: Verifiable Policy & Downstream Prediction
statutory.text: We bridge the gap between policy intent and system logic upfront. We provide your engineering teams with the exact deterministic rules, preventing endless policy reviews from dragging out timelines. We mathematically verify that new code won't trigger cascading downstream errors in interconnected programs, defending you against unfunded federal mandates.

rulesEngine.title: AI Governance & Secure Infrastructure
rulesEngine.text: We write the administrative law to legally bind and control AI deployments. We mandate strict architectural boundaries to protect sensitive IRS and HIPAA data, ensuring new automation tools act as caseworker aids, not unverified, probabilistic decision engines.

sanction.title: System Accountability & Smart Procurement
sanction.text: We force engineering accountability. We write strict technical rules for your RFPs and internal IT charters to prevent massive vendors or isolated internal teams from creating unmaintainable legacy code. We help fund this oversight by braiding federal grants with civic philanthropy.

data.title: Frontline Operations & Workforce Design
data.text: Even perfectly translated code fails if caseworkers cannot use it. We engineer operational procedures around the people who actually do the work, deploying frontline-first change management to build professional, empowered state workforces.

sprint.title: Targeted Architectural Interventions
sprint.text: Rapid oversight deployments to diagnose structural logic flaws, bypass policy bottlenecks, map downstream dependencies, and verify complex code.

advisory.title: Technical Expert Advisory
advisory.text: Long-term partnership acting as the State's technical referee, eliminating policy drag, predicting cross-system downstream effects, and pre-testing new rules before production.

integration.title: System Procurement & Blueprinting
integration.text: End-to-end consulting to write the strict technical rules of massive state RFPs or internal builds, ensuring programmatic changes execute deterministically.

hero.label: Research
hero.title: Threat Intelligence & Diagnostics
hero.subtitle: Clear analysis on why policy lag stalls government tech, how unverified code triggers downstream penalties, and how to survive federal audits.

adv1.title: Predicting Cross-Program Blast Radiuses
adv1.desc: Why isolated code changes trigger massive federal variances, and how wide-lens SME prevents cascading errors.

adv2.title: Protecting Data with Secure Gateways
adv2.desc: The severe risks of using commercial cloud platforms for state benefits, and how to mandate secure alternatives.

adv3.title: Translating Policy Upfront
adv3.desc: Why waiting on policy reviews stalls IT deployments, and how to mathematically provide developers with deterministic code from day one.

adv4.title: Frontline-First Operational Design
adv4.desc: Why perfectly coded systems fail without operational alignment, and how to build an empowered state workforce.

adv5.title: Fighting Federal Payment Penalties
adv5.desc: How state agencies can reconstruct system data to prove structural logic flaws and successfully fight federal audit fines.

adv6.title: Defeating Tech Debt & Vendor Lock-In
adv6.desc: How bad procurement and isolated IT teams exploit vague rules, and how to mandate strict engineering boundaries.

founder.title: Founder Dossier
founder.intro: We provide the architectural oversight and wide-lens programmatic SME required to eliminate policy bottlenecks and ensure state mandates are flawlessly translated into deterministic system code.
founder.p1: Applied Policy Systems was established to guide state agencies out of the 'Modernization Trap.' States spent hundreds of millions moving to the cloud, only to realize their IT teams are trapped waiting on complex policy interpretations, and their systems are blind to cross-program downstream effects.
founder.p2: We act as the ultimate accelerator and strategic failsafe for State CIOs and Agency Directors. We leverage our unique scope of programmatic experience to provide exact technical logic upfront, bypassing bureaucratic drag and ensuring your infrastructure is accurate, accountable, and legally secure.
